items.title: SVD as rotate–scale–rotate
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  x["input x"] --> Vt["V transpose: input basis"]
  Vt --> S["Sigma: scale by singular values"]
  S --> U["U: output basis"]
  U --> y["output Ax"]
items.caption: A = U Σ Vᵀ applies Vᵀ (change to singular-vector coordinates), scales by σᵢ, then maps through U to the output space.

items.title: Truncated rank-k approximation
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  full["full SVD: all sigma_i"] --> trunc["keep top k sigma"]
  trunc --> approx["A_k low-rank matrix"]
  full -.-> noise["dropped small sigma: noise/detail"]
items.caption: Keeping the largest k singular values yields the closest rank-k matrix to A in Frobenius norm.
